title: Ichi Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The report provides a detailed analysis of potential vulnerabilities in the Ichi platform's Governance contract and offers comprehensive recommendations to address these issues. The implementation section also outlines the use of SafeMath and access control mechanisms, which are crucial for enhancing the security of the contract.
audit.improvements: The report could benefit from including a more detailed explanation of the gas token mechanism and how it would prevent front-running. Additionally, a discussion on the potential impact of each recommended improvement on the overall performance and usability of the contract would be valuable.
